info.name: EV Rental GO — Sprint 2 Integration Tests
info.description:
Sprint 2 Integration & Security Tests

▶ วิธีใช้
1. Import Collection + Environment (EV Rental GO — Local Dev)
2. เลือก Environment ที่มุมขวาบน
3. รัน folder ตามลำดับ: Dashboard → Fleet → Blacklist → Contract Enforcement → Audit Log → Permissions → Pricing → RBAC Security
4. IDs จะ auto-save จาก response

⚠️ RBAC Security folder ต้องรันสุดท้ายเสมอ — มันล็อค session เป็น viewer
   หลังรัน RBAC Security ให้ Login as Super Admin อีกครั้งก่อนทำอย่างอื่น

exec: // ─── Auto-inject session cookie on every request ───────────────
// ─── Auto-capture session cookie on every response ─────────────

item.name: 📊 Dashboard
item.description: ทดสอบ Dashboard Aggregation APIs — สรุป Fleet, KYC, Revenue

exec: const sum = j.available + j.rented + j.charging + j.underRepair + j.offline;
pm.test('Each entry has day and revenue', () => {
// 1) Synchronously override the Cookie header the collection pre-request just set.
//    This MUST be synchronous so it runs in the item pre-request phase,
//    which executes AFTER the collection pre-request.
// 2) Also clear the Postman cookie jar via server-side logout
//    so the jar doesn't inject the real cookie alongside our invalid header.
// Re-apply override inside callback too, just in case Postman re-processes headers.
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ email: 'admin@evrentalgo.com', password: 'admin1234' }) }
pm.test('At least one vehicle exists', () => pm.expect(first).to.exist);
pm.test('Error mentions valid statuses', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().error).to.include('status must be one of'));

item.name: 🔒 RBAC Security
item.description:
ทดสอบ RBAC ครบทุก Sprint 2 API — Viewer & Admin ไม่ควรทำอะไรเกินสิทธิ์

⚠️ Folder นี้จะ switch session ไปเป็น viewer/admin แล้ว restore กลับเป็น super_admin ตอนท้าย
ต้องรันสุดท้ายเสมอ

item.name: Viewer — GET Audit Logs (allowed: admin+viewer can read)

exec: pm.test('Viewer can READ audit logs (200)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Status 403 — viewer cannot change vehicle status', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test('Status 403 — viewer cannot execute remote actions', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test('Status 403 — viewer cannot blacklist customers', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test('Status 403 — only super_admin can modify permissions', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test('Status 403 — viewer cannot modify pricing', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test('Status 403 — viewer cannot access user list', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test('Admin can update vehicle status (200)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Status 403 — only super_admin can modify permissions', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test('Status 403 — only super_admin can access user management', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test('Status 403 — only super_admin can create users', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

item.name: 🌐 Input Validation (Security)
item.description: ทดสอบ Input Validation ทุก POST/PATCH endpoint — reject unexpected/malicious fields
